sections.title: Let Us Go to the Altar
sections.author: Dan Schutte
sections.snippet: Let us go to the altar of God, the God of our gladness and joy! Let us enter the courts of the house of the Lord and sing to the glory of God.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: Who is This King of Glory? It is the Lord!

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: A light of revelation to the Gentiles, and glory for your people Israel

sections.title: Mary Sing with Joyful Heart (Ave Maria)
sections.author: Steve Angrisano/James Quinn SJ
sections.snippet: Mary, sing with joyful heart: “You shall bear Emmanuel!” Virgin Mother, full of grace, pray for us to God, your Son!

sections.title: I Have Loved You
sections.author: Michael Joncas
sections.snippet: I have loved you with an everlasting love, I have called you and you are mine; I have loved you with an everlasting love, I have called you and you are mine.

sections.title: The Goodness of the Lord
sections.author: Scott Soper
sections.snippet: I believe,  I believe I shall see the goodness of the Lord in the land,  in the land of the living.

sections.title: With One Voice
sections.author: Ricky Manalo CSP
sections.snippet: Take the Word and go out to ev'ry land: shine the light of Christ for all to see! May the lives of those we touch sing praise to God above. Let us sing, we'll sing:

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
